subject: [PATCH v8 09/15] userfaultfd: add UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP and UFFDIO_RWPROTECT plumbing

2026-07-03.patch_summary: This patch adds a new feature to the Linux kernel's userfaultfd interface called read-write protection tracking (RWP). It introduces two new ioctls, UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP and UFFDIO_RWPROTECT, which allow userspace to register ranges for RWP tracking and install/remove RWP on those ranges. The feature is gated by CONFIG_USERFAULTFD_RWP, which is auto-selected on 64-bit kernels with certain architecture features. The patch also includes documentation updates and changes to the userfaultfd code to support this new feature.
